calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant KAWSF, LLC.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Emmanuel Enyinwa, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Andrew Li, who was placed under oath but did not testify.
Anna Li, the sister of and witness for plaintiff Andrew Li, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant KAWSF, LLC.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on June 7, 2013.
Statement of Damages was served on December 1, 2014 and filed on October 16, 2017.
Dismissals without prejudice as to defendants Hoang Kong, Gordon Wong, Terry Wong and Tommy Toy were filed on September 29, 2014.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Kien Kam was filed on December 2, 2014.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Drunken Saint was filed on May 1, 2015.
Default was entered against defendant KAWSF, LLC was entered on June 20, 2016.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 16, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Andrew Li, and against the Defaulted Defendant KAWSF, LLC, as follows:

General Damages - $1,250,000.00.
Special Damages - $850,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $354,410.98.
Costs - $600.00.

Total - $2,455,010.98.

Proposed judment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
